betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Biodiesel is best made using the most advanced vairent of canola -- it's simply more diesel per unit time.

The 'green goo' rocket fuel is strong and availible early, and is completely renewable. Starlight rocket fuel is an enourmous upgrade, but a significant amount of infrastructure to pull off. 

The large naq reactor has been buffed considerably, and boosting it with oxygen plasma is a good idea.

Plasma turbine rotors barely take durability damage.

You can use hot coolant for a significant amount of power, either from the heat exchanger (slow and not recommended) or from advanced fusion (supercritical steam, you will probably have to void excess).
